DialogueText: Time Cop! The train board is blank! The people need you! Fix the time!
ChineseSubtitle: 時空戰警！火車時刻表空白了！人們需要你！修復時間！

DialogueText: Excuse me! What time is the next train?! I don't know — the clocks are bad!
ChineseSubtitle: 不好意思！下一班火車幾點開？時鐘壞了！

DialogueText: Thank you! The train is back on the board! You saved us!
ChineseSubtitle: 謝謝！火車班次回到看板上了！你救了我們！

DialogueText: Good job! The time is fixed. Keep going!
ChineseSubtitle: 做得好！時間修復了。繼續前進！

DialogueText: Ha! Wrong time word! The clock is broken! Try again!
ChineseSubtitle: 哈！時間詞錯了！時鐘壞了！再試一次！

DialogueText: No! Remember — for exact times like 8:15, use AT. Try again!
ChineseSubtitle: 不對！記住——精確的幾點幾分要用 AT，再試一次！

DialogueText: The station is working! You get 3 crystals. Go to the next place!
ChineseSubtitle: 車站恢復運作了！你得到3顆水晶。前往下一個地點！

DialogueText: The holidays are gone! Thanksgiving, Christmas — they are lost. Use the right time words to find them!
ChineseSubtitle: 節日不見了！感恩節、聖誕節——都遺失了。用正確的時間詞找回它們！

DialogueText: Where is my Thanksgiving dinner? Is it ON a Thursday or IN November?!
ChineseSubtitle: 我的感恩節晚餐在哪裡？是在星期四（ON）還是十一月（IN）？！

DialogueText: Thanksgiving is back! I can smell the food! On the fourth Thursday — great!
ChineseSubtitle: 感恩節回來了！我聞到食物的味道了！在第四個星期四——太好了！

DialogueText: Yes! Dates use ON. Months use IN. You are doing great!
ChineseSubtitle: 沒錯！日期用 ON，月份用 IN。你做得很棒！

DialogueText: IN a Monday? ON July? Your time words are bad! The holidays are lost!
ChineseSubtitle: IN a Monday？ON July？你的時間詞太糟了！節日還是不見！

DialogueText: No! Think: is it a specific day (ON) or a month (IN)?
ChineseSubtitle: 不！想想看：是特定的一天（ON）還是一個月（IN）？

DialogueText: The holidays are back! Everyone is happy. Now find Dr. Chronos!
ChineseSubtitle: 節日都回來了！每個人都很開心。現在去找出 Dr. Chronos！

DialogueText: The last fight! Dr. Chronos is dropping bombs with FAKE time words. Fix the sentence before the time is up!
ChineseSubtitle: 最後的戰鬥！Dr. Chronos 正在丟下帶有假時間詞的炸彈。在時間結束前修復句子！

DialogueText: You cannot stop my bombs! On tomorrow! In last year! Try to stop me!
ChineseSubtitle: 你無法阻止我的炸彈！On tomorrow！In last year！試著阻止我吧！

DialogueText: Wow, no boom! You took out the fake word just in time!
ChineseSubtitle: 哇，沒有爆炸！你及時拿掉了假字！

DialogueText: Perfect! Remember: DO NOT use in/on/at before words like THIS, LAST, EVERY, TOMORROW!
ChineseSubtitle: 完美！記住：在 THIS, LAST, EVERY, TOMORROW 等字前面不要加 in/on/at！

DialogueText: BOOM! The bomb went off! I will give you one more try... to fail!
ChineseSubtitle: 轟！炸彈爆炸了！我再給你一次機會…再次失敗吧！

DialogueText: Watch out — many bombs! Delete the fake time words! No prepositions!
ChineseSubtitle: 小心——有很多炸彈！刪掉假的時間詞！不要介係詞！

DialogueText: No! My traps were perfect! How did you stop me?!
ChineseSubtitle: 不！我的陷阱是完美的！你怎麼阻止我的？！

DialogueText: Great job! New York is safe. The crystals are yours!
ChineseSubtitle: 做得太好了！紐約安全了。水晶是你的！

DialogueText: The new year clock is ticking! AT midnight — we remember! Thank you!
ChineseSubtitle: 新年時鐘在倒數！AT midnight——我們記住了！謝謝你！
